violations.text: The doors to the outside, located in the front service area and the back hallway, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Establishment is to install weather stripping or door sweeps to prevent the entry of pests. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024

Drain from the prep sink hangs below the flood rim. Drain is to be above the flood rim to prevent back siphonage in the event of negative pressure in water supply system. Establishment is to contact plumber to correct air gap. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
